cockroachdb.description: CockroachDB Cloud MCP Server - Provides read-only access to IncidentMind's incident memory
notes: Safe by default: read-only mode with full audit logging
Human operators can query incident memory via Claude or Cursor
Example queries: 'Show me all P1 incidents this week', 'What was the root cause of the last database issue?'
No custom proxy required - connects directly to CockroachDB Cloud

usage_examples.description: Lists recent incidents with severity and status

usage_examples.prompt: Find incidents similar to 'connection pool exhausted'
What patterns have we learned about database issues?
usage_examples.description: Shows correlation patterns for database-related incidents

usage_examples.prompt: Show me the resolution for the last SSL certificate issue
